title: Plague Prayers of Mursili II
description: A Hittite king confesses his father's sins and begs the gods to end a plague.
introduction: A Hittite king confesses his father's sins and begs the gods to end a plague.

translation.text: O Storm God of Hatti, my lord! My father sinned and transgressed against your word. But I have not sinned. Yet the sin of the father falls upon the son. I have confessed before you. Take pity on me and drive the plague out of the land of Hatti.
